'''Morgot''' was a [[Color/Legends|red]]-skinned [[Skrilling/Legends|Skrilling]] friend of the<ref name="CSWE" /> [[Kiffar/Legends|Kiffar]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]<ref name="DBVos">{{DB|character|quinlanvos|Vos, Quinlan}}</ref> [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]]. Morgot was a ready source of information for Vos and was a notoriously bad [[Gambler/Legends|gambler]] who often got into trouble covering his debts.<ref name="CSWE" /> He was being beaten up by [[Nastyboy]], to whom he owed [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|money]], when [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] and Vos came looking for Morgot. Upon witnessing the scene taking place before them, Aayla proceeded to use a [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]] to persuade the thug to go home. Morgot then told Quinlan where to find the [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Vilmarh Grahrk]].
